research.market_summary: Live conditions are not confirming the morning thesis due to uncertain oil prices and unresolved geopolitical factors.

failed_conditions: Brent direction is unclear; wait for stabilization above $100 or further de-escalation below $90.
XOM.execution_condition: Watch for oil direction to clarify: if Brent stabilizes above $100 and Iran talks collapse (oil re-spikes), upgrade to buy at $158-160; if de-escalation holds and oil breaks below $90, step aside and look for $148-152 re-entry

failed_conditions: WTI crude needs to hold below $95 and UAL must be trading above $100, but conditions are mixed.
UAL.execution_condition: WTI crude holding below $95 at open and through first 30 minutes of trading; UAL trading above $100 (confirming it held the bounce from $89 lows); no new Iran escalation headlines premarket

failed_conditions: Need clarity from Iran news and oil pricing above $90, which is currently unresolved.
OXY.execution_condition: Wait for Iran news to resolve direction; if oil holds above $90 WTI and HSBC $68 target draws buyers toward $63-65 range, enter on a test of $63 with confirmation of volume

news_headlines.title: Jabil, CECO Environmental, Iridium, Viasat, and Dell Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
news_headlines.summary: Several stocks, including Jabil, CECO Environmental, Iridium, Viasat, and Dell, experienced declines due to intensified geopolitical tensions in the Middle East, which pushed major indices into correction territory. The conflict with Iran led to a surge in oil prices, fueling inflation fears and promoting a "risk-off" sentiment among investors. This market downturn saw these specific companies' shares fall by over 5%, despite some having positive year-to-date performance.

Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: NetApp (NTAP), Intuit (INTU) and Coherent Corp (COHR)
news_headlines.summary: Analysts from Citi and Rosenblatt Securities have provided updated ratings for NetApp (NTAP), Intuit (INTU), and Coherent Corp (COHR). Citi reiterated a Hold rating for NetApp with a consensus price target of $116.91, and a Buy rating for Intuit, whose consensus target is $579.67. Rosenblatt reiterated a Buy rating for Coherent Corp, setting a price target of $375.00, while the consensus target is $278.75.

news_headlines.title: Intel Corporation’s 18A Bet Faces First Market Test as Business PCs Arrive Tuesday
news_headlines.summary: Intel's 18A process commercial PCs, featuring Core Ultra Series 3 and vPro platform, will launch on March 31, with Dell being one of the first to deliver systems. This rollout is critical for Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan's strategy to regain manufacturing leadership and bolster the company's foundry business. The timing coincides with a major PC refresh cycle for businesses, though rising memory prices and potential slower uptake of AI PCs present challenges for Intel amid fierce competition from AMD and Arm.

news_headlines.title: Nvidia GTC reflects shift toward an integrated AI system
news_headlines.summary: Nvidia GTC 2026 showcased Nvidia's evolution beyond a hardware company into a full-stack AI platform. Key insights from the event highlight the growing importance of digital simulation for AI, the shift towards integrated AI systems for hardware efficiency, and Nvidia's collaborative efforts with partners like Dell and Vast Data to solve the "data problem" for AI factories. These partnerships and innovations address challenges like content generation, energy consumption, and data management in the expanding AI landscape.

news_headlines.title: Dell Technologies (DELL) Is Up 12.2% After Expanding End-to-End AI And Quantum-Ready Security Offering – Has The Bull Case Changed?
news_headlines.summary: Dell Technologies has expanded its AI-ready commercial portfolio and introduced quantum-resistant security features, alongside deeper collaborations in AI infrastructure, including with Nvidia. These moves position Dell as an end-to-end provider for enterprise AI workloads, shifting focus beyond traditional PCs and servers. While these advancements reinforce Dell's near-term growth catalysts around AI servers, the article questions if these changes fundamentally alter the bull case, given ongoing margin pressures from commoditized hardware and cyclical PC exposure.

news_headlines.title: Press Kit: Intel Pro Day 2026
news_headlines.summary: Intel introduced its most comprehensive commercial client portfolio at Intel Pro Day 2026, featuring over 125 designs built on Intel 18A manufacturing. The portfolio includes Intel Core Ultra Series 3 with Intel vPro, new Intel Arc Pro B70 and B65 GPUs, and Intel Xeon 600 workstation processors, targeting enterprise, education, government, and SMB markets. This launch emphasizes next-generation performance, integrated AI acceleration, and enhanced manageability and security for modern workplaces.

news_headlines.title: Urban-gro Shares Tumble 31% as Industry Faces Turbulence and Increased Oversight: Unpacking the Reasons for the Sharp Decline
news_headlines.summary: Urban-gro (UGRO) experienced a sharp 30.79% intraday decline, with its shares tumbling from $28.3 to $16.16, primarily due to escalating regulatory scrutiny on agricultural equipment manufacturers regarding job outsourcing and shareholder payouts. This sector-wide concern, which also impacted DELL, points to increased market volatility and potential tariffs. Technical indicators show UGRO as overbought with high volatility, suggesting that investors should prepare for continued turbulence and regulatory risks.

news_headlines.title: US Indicts Three In Second Nvidia AI Chip Smuggling Case Linked To Supermicro Servers
news_headlines.summary: The U.S. Department of Justice has indicted three individuals for allegedly conspiring to illegally export servers containing Nvidia AI chips to China via Thailand. This marks the second such case in two weeks involving Supermicro servers, though Supermicro itself has not been charged and claims the individuals acted against company policies. Nvidia confirmed that its due diligence prevented the smugglers from acquiring GPUs directly from them.

news_headlines.summary: (Bloomberg) -- US energy stocks are on track to top the broader market by the biggest margin ever, as investors rushed to the group amid the Middle East war and a broader rotation away from pricey technology names. The S&P 500 Energy Index is up 39% in the first quarter so far, compared to a 7% decline in the S&P 500 Index. news_headlines.summary: Exxon Mobil’s  scientists delivered a grim message to one of the oil company’s top strategic-planning executives in February 2020: Its much-heralded algae biofuels program was falling well short of its stated goals.  A week later, Exxon told investors algae could become a more prolific source of biofuel in the near term than agricultural products such as sugarcane and palm.
